mnemonics.title: DAS vs NAS vs SAN Access Levels
mnemonics.content: "DAS and SAN = Block, NAS = File." Remember: DAS (direct) and SAN (storage network) both give block-level access like a local disk. NAS gives file-level access like a shared folder.

mnemonics.title: RAID Levels Memory Aid
mnemonics.content: "0 is Zero safety, 1 is One copy, 5 is Five-star balance, 10 is Ten for best of both." RAID 0 = no redundancy, RAID 1 = one mirror copy, RAID 5 = balanced (parity), RAID 10 = mirror + stripe.

mnemonics.title: NAS Protocols
mnemonics.content: "NFS for Nix (Unix), CIFS for See (Windows)." NFS = Network File System used in Unix/Linux. CIFS = Common Internet File System used in Windows.
